name: Casey Muratori
tagline: Performance, game engines, and API design
description: Exploring Casey Muratori's writings on performance-aware programming, game engine architecture, API design, and The Witness.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Casey Muratori, creator of Handmade Hero and Computer Enhance. He is known for performance-aware programming, strong opinions on API design and software architecture, and his critique of 'Clean Code' practices. He worked on The Witness, Braid, and other game projects.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Casey Muratori is known for strong positions on performance-first programming, opposition to OOP abstractions and 'Clean Code' dogma, and advocacy for understanding hardware. He regularly challenges mainstream software engineering practices.
